description: Creating definitive figure showing structural superposition per-residue distances and pLDDT profile for DNAJC28
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Per-residue distances from the superposition analysis
residues_c28 = list(range(51, 114))  # 63 residues
per_res_distances = [
    2.01, 2.12, 1.87, 1.49, 1.54, 1.61, 1.28, 1.57, 1.73, 2.06, 2.31, 1.66,
    1.86, 2.60, 2.51, 1.66, 1.87, 2.23, 1.87, 1.34, 1.56, 1.68, 1.38, 1.24, 
    1.17, 1.19, 1.24, 1.28, 1.96, 0.93, 2.60, 3.89, 5.90, 7.78, 7.37, 5.22,
    5.77, 5.56, 7.09, 6.24, 4.35, 5.16, 6.80, 6.43, 4.60, 4.94, 7.25, 6.92,
    4.40, 5.37, 8.62, 8.23, 5.76, 4.59, 4.76, 3.04, 4.01, 4.51, 8.39, 9.73,
    11.09, 12.44, 17.37
]

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10))

# Panel 1: Per-residue CA distances after superposition
colors = []
for i, res in enumerate(residues_c28):
    if 51 <= res <= 54:
        colors.append('#90CAF9')  # Helix I - light blue
    elif 55 <= res <= 62:
        colors.append('#BDBDBD')  # Loop I-II - gray
    elif 63 <= res <= 76:
        colors.append('#4CAF50')  # Helix II - green
    elif 77 <= res <= 78:
        colors.append('#FFEB3B')  # HPD loop pre
    elif 79 <= res <= 81:
        colors.append('#F44336')  # HPD
    elif 82 <= res <= 87:
        colors.append('#FFEB3B')  # HPD loop post
    elif 88 <= res <= 107:
        colors.append('#2196F3')  # Helix III
    else:
        colors.append('#9E9E9E')  # C-terminal

ax1.bar(residues_c28, per_res_distances, color=colors, edgecolor='none', width=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=2.0, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7, label='2.0 Å threshold')
ax1.axhline(y=5.0, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7, label='5.0 Å threshold')

# Add region labels
ax1.annotate('Helix I', xy=(52, 14), fontsize=9, ha='center', color='#1565C0')
ax1.annotate('Loop\nI-II', xy=(58, 14), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='gray')
ax1.annotate('Helix II\nRMSD=1.78 Å', xy=(69, 14), fontsize=10, ha='center', color='#2E7D32', fontweight='bold')
ax1.annotate('HPD\n1.95 Å', xy=(80, 14), fontsize=9, ha='center', color='#B71C1C', fontweight='bold')
ax1.annotate('HPD loop', xy=(84, 14), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='#F57F17')
ax1.annotate('Helix III/IV\nRMSD=5.88 Å', xy=(97, 14), fontsize=10, ha='center', color='#1565C0', fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_xlabel('DNAJC28 Residue Number', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_ylabel('CA Distance After\nSuperposition (Å)', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_title('Structural Superposition: DNAJC28 vs DNAJA1 J-domain (AlphaFold)', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax1.legend(loc='upper left', fontsize=9)
ax1.set_xlim(49, 115)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 18)

# Add interpretation box
textstr = 'Helix II + HPD: <2 Å RMSD\n(Hsp70 interaction surface conserved)'
props = dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#E8F5E9', edgecolor='#4CAF50', alpha=0.9)
ax1.text(0.72, 0.85, textstr, transform=ax1.transAxes, fontsize=11,
        verticalalignment='top', bbox=props, fontweight='bold')

# Panel 2: pLDDT profile with domain color coding
import requests

pdb_text = requests.get("https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q9NX36-F1-model_v6.pdb").text
all_res = []
all_plddt = []
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66])
        all_res.append(res_num)
        all_plddt.append(bfactor)

# Color by domain
bar_colors = []
for r in all_res:
    if 45 <= r <= 54:
        bar_colors.append('#90CAF9')
    elif 55 <= r <= 62:
        bar_colors.append('#BDBDBD')
    elif 63 <= r <= 76:
        bar_colors.append('#4CAF50')
    elif 77 <= r <= 87:
        bar_colors.append('#FFEB3B')
    elif 79 <= r <= 81:
        bar_colors.append('#F44336')
    elif 88 <= r <= 115:
        bar_colors.append('#2196F3')
    elif 203 <= r <= 271:
        bar_colors.append('#9C27B0')
    else:
        bar_colors.append('#E0E0E0')

ax2.bar(all_res, all_plddt, color=bar_colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')
ax2.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, linewidth=0.8)
ax2.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, linewidth=0.8)
ax2.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.4, linewidth=0.8)

# Domain annotations
ax2.annotate('J-domain\n(51-115)\npLDDT=87.3', xy=(83, 95), fontsize=10, ha='center', 
            fontweight='bold', color='#2E7D32',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='white', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='#4CAF50'))
ax2.annotate('DJC28_CD\n(203-271)\npLDDT=87.0', xy=(237, 95), fontsize=10, ha='center',
            fontweight='bold', color='#6A1B9A',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='white', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='#9C27B0'))

ax2.set_xlabel('Residue Number', fontsize=12)
ax2.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=12)
ax2.set_title('DNAJC28 AlphaFold Confidence Profile with Domain Architecture', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 390)
ax2.set_ylim(20, 100)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('dnajc28_structural_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
print("Final figure saved: dnajc28_structural_analysis.png")
